MINISTRY or WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th August, 2011 5,0. 1803(E).—~Whereas the Central Government, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and sub—section (2) ofSection 14 of the Inter— State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956), constituted the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal for verification and adjudication of certain matters of the Punjab Settlement, referred therein, 2 vide notification ofthe Government ofIndia in the Ministry , ofWater Resumes, number S.O.169(E), dated the 2ndApril, 1986, and the said Tribunal forwarded its report to the 2 Central Government on 30th January, 1987', ”“2 .22.”. And whereas, further references have been made by the Central Government to the said Tribunal on 19th August, 1987, requiring explanation and guidance on the report aforesaid, in terms of sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the said Act; And whereas, considering the enormous exercise undertaken by the said Tribunal in completing its further report, the Central Government extended from time to time the period of making the said report, till the 5th August, 2011; And whereas, the Central Government, keeping in , view the exigencies of the work involved, as pointed out by the said Tribunal, considers it necessary to extend the said period for another six months after the 5th August, 201 1; man. 1700(3), area 16 arts, 2008, - Now, therefore, in exercise ofthe powers conferred by the proviso to sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the Inter— State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956), the Central Government hereby further extends the period, within which the said Tribunal may forward its report on the references so made, to the Central Government till the 5th day ofFebruary, 2012, and for that purpose, makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources, number 5.0. 90503), dated the 5th August, 2003, namely 1—— In the said notification, in the last paragraph. for the words, figures and letters “till the 5th day ofAugust, 2011”, the words, figures and letters “till the 5th day of February, 2012” shall be substituted. [171140. 15/3/3541] DHRUV VIJAI SlNGl-I, Secy. Footnote: -—The principal notification constituting the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal was prlfized :htheGazeueofl-rdz'avide number 5.0. 169(E), dated the 2nd April, 1986 and subsequently amended vide number 8.0. 666(E), dated the 10th June, 2003; and the period within which the Tribunal was required to forward its firrther report to the Central Government was extended from time to time vide number 8.0. 905 (E), dated the 5th August, 2003, 80. 889(5), dated the 5th August, 2004, 8.0. 166(E), datedthe 4th February, 2005, 3.0. 1093(E), dated the 4thAugust, 2005, 8.0. 13303), datedthe 3rd February, 2006, 5.0. 1218(E), dated the 28th July, 2006, 8.0. 104(E), dated 1 the 2nd February, 2007, 8.0. 1112(E), dated the 6th July, 2007, 8.0. 212(E), dated the 30th January, 2008, 8.0. 1700(E), dated the 16th July, 2008, S0. 397(E), dated the 4th February, 2009, SD. 1812(E), dated the 23rd July, 2009, 8.0. 20303), dated the 29th January, 2010, 8.0. 1920(E), dated the 5th August, 2010 and 8.0. 25003), datedthe 4th February, 2011. i’mnedbyzme Manager,:Govemment of India Press, Rig Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi~l10064 and Published by the Controller of mums, Delhi—110054. -- 2 of 2 --
